global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on food delivery services.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the text 'SALE' in a contrasting color, located at the top right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: A prominent headline in a large, bold font that reads 'Hungry? We got you', centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A call-to-action button with the text 'Try for free' in a bold font, located just below the headline in the bottom section of the ad.

elements.label: Late-night deals message
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that reads 'Late-night deals available', providing additional context in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A price tag displaying '$4.99' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the headline is centered in the lower part, the CTA is below the headline, and the price tag is at the bottom left.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available, $4.99, FreshDash, SALE
